suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a repo convention for empty directories required by tests (e.g., commit a .gitkeep placeholder) so fresh clones don't rely on local-only directories.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature static-file-infrastructure had tests asserting static/js and static/css directories existed, but commit 93af9e5 could not track empty dirs in git; this was only resolved in the next feature commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document how to handle Droid-Shield false positives on committed public address lists (tokenlists), including preferred mitigation patterns for this repo.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The first static-file-infrastructure worker session was blocked by Droid-Shield on tokenlist address content and needed a second session workaround (gitignore + runtime/build-time download).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'write tests first (where applicable)' step for extraction/refactor-only frontend changes, including when a minimal smoke test (e.g., GET /) is expected.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature extract-inline-ui passed with no added pytest tests while reporting followedProcedure=true, indicating ambiguity between skill guidance and acceptable execution for pure extraction refactors.
